commands.review_summary:
This PR normalizes OpenClaw CalVer correction runtime versions before plugin API range checks, adds ClawHub helper/install regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main sends the correction host version into ClawHub plugin API validation, and generic semver comparison makes `2026.5.3-1` sort below `2026.5.3`; I verified this path by source inspection rather than executing tests.
